sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Goosehead Insurance (GSHD) insiders log net sale of 5,486 Class A shares
feed.summary: Insiders at Goosehead Insurance (GSHD), including the Mark & Robyn Jones Descendants Trust 2014 and individuals Mark Evan Jones and Robyn Mary Elizabeth Jones, converted and sold a net total of 5,486 Class A shares. These sales occurred on April 28–29, 2026, at weighted average prices between $48 and $49 per share, following conversions of LLC Units and Class B shares. Despite the sales, the reporting persons retain significant holdings through LLC Units and Class B shares, indicating continued economic exposure to the company.

feed.title: GH Research Raises $111 Million in Completed Share Offering to Fund Depression Pipeline
feed.summary: GH Research (GHRS) successfully completed an underwritten public offering, raising approximately $111.2 million by selling 6,527,779 ordinary shares at $18.00 each. The capital will be used to advance the company's depression therapies, including research, clinical development, and pre-commercialization efforts for treatment-resistant depression therapies. This equity raise reflects investor confidence in GH Research's pipeline despite its current lack of revenue and widening losses, partly offset by a strong balance sheet.

feed.title: Global Ship Lease (NYSE:GSL) Upgraded by Fearnley Fonds to Strong-Buy Rating
feed.summary: Fearnley Fonds has upgraded Global Ship Lease (NYSE:GSL) from a "hold" to a "strong-buy" rating. This upgrade aligns with MarketBeat's consensus of "Moderate Buy" and an average price target of $40.33. The company recently reported strong financial results, including EPS of $2.32 and revenue of $190.95 million, and it maintains a low PE ratio of 3.55.

feed.title: After tax other income/expense of Prologis, Inc. – HAN:POJN
feed.summary: This article presents a financial data point for Prologis, Inc. (POJN) listed on the Hannover Stock Exchange, specifically focusing on its after-tax other income/expense. It provides a placeholder for the period value, change, and percentage change. The content primarily focuses on metadata and navigation links for TradingView.

feed.title: US Bancorp DE Acquires 4,407 Shares of Talen Energy Corporation $TLN
feed.summary: US Bancorp DE increased its holdings in Talen Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:TLN) by 4.3% in the fourth quarter, acquiring an additional 4,407 shares to own a total of 105,848 shares valued at approximately $39.68 million. Talen Energy shares opened at $372.42, with a market cap of $16.91 billion, a negative P/E ratio, and a high debt-to-equity ratio. Analysts generally rate the stock as a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $449.08.

feed.title: ExxonMobil Announces First-Quarter 2026 Results
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil Corporation reported first-quarter 2026 earnings of $4.2 billion, or $1.00 per share, which rose to $8.8 billion or $2.09 per share when excluding identified items and estimated timing effects. The company sustained industry-leading reliability, achieved record production in Guyana, and reached first LNG at Golden Pass Train 1. ExxonMobil returned $9.2 billion to shareholders through dividends and share repurchases, and generated $8.7 billion in cash flow from operating activities.

feed.title: EU clears Moderna's flu-COVID shot as Q1 loss hits $1.3B
feed.summary: Moderna reported a Q1 2026 revenue of $389 million and a GAAP net loss of $1.3 billion, primarily due to a $0.9 billion litigation settlement charge. Despite the loss, the company reiterated its 2026 target of up to 10% revenue growth and announced EU approvals for its flu-COVID combination vaccine, mCOMBRIAX, along with mNEXSPIKE and mRESVIA. Moderna also initiated a Phase 3 study for intismeran in high-risk Stage 1 NSCLC and anticipates several significant pipeline readouts throughout 2026.

feed.title: One system for futures and options: Broadridge completes CQG buy
feed.summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions (NYSE: BR) has completed its acquisition of CQG, a provider of futures and options trading, execution management, and market connectivity. This strategic move enhances Broadridge's trading and connectivity platforms, creating an integrated, end-to-end multi-asset trading solution for a broad range of financial clients. The acquisition also advances Broadridge's multi-asset innovation strategy to include FX and digital assets.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson has a new VP of investor relations
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson has appointed Ryan Koors as the new VP of investor relations, effective May 7, 2026. Koors, who joined J&J in 2002, brings over 20 years of financial experience across various sectors of the company. He will report to EVP and CFO Joseph J. Wolk, succeeding Darren Snellgrove, who is departing to become CFO at Halozyme.

feed.title: Align Technology plans $200 million stock buyback by October
feed.summary: Align Technology (NASDAQ:ALGN) announced a plan to repurchase $200 million of its common stock by October 2026, as part of a larger $1 billion stock repurchase program. The buyback will be funded by cash on hand, with the company holding $1.06 billion in cash and cash equivalents as of March 31, 2026. This move follows strong Q1 2026 financial results, where the company surpassed earnings and revenue forecasts, and comes as its shares trade below their InvestingPro Fair Value.

feed.title: Deere names Brent Norwood as chief financial officer
feed.summary: Deere & Company has appointed Brent Norwood, 44, as senior vice president and chief financial officer, effective immediately. Norwood brings over 20 years of experience within Deere and the financial industry, having previously served as vice president and finance director for the company's Construction and Forestry division and John Deere Power Systems. His appointment follows an internal and external search and is expected to be crucial for executing Deere's strategy and delivering long-term shareholder value.

feed.title: We Wouldn't Be Too Quick To Buy Texas Instruments Incorporated (NASDAQ:TXN) Before It Goes Ex-Dividend
feed.summary: Texas Instruments (NASDAQ:TXN) is set to go ex-dividend soon, with a dividend payment of US$1.42 per share. The company's dividend yield is 2.0%, but concerns arise from its high payout ratios of 95% of income and 136% of free cash flow, coupled with stagnant earnings growth over the past five years. These factors suggest the dividend may not be sustainable in the long term, urging caution for investors prioritizing dividend reliability.

feed.title: Earnings Beat: T-Mobile US, Inc. Just Beat Analyst Forecasts, And Analysts Have Been Updating Their Models
feed.summary: T-Mobile US, Inc. (NASDAQ:TMUS) recently reported strong first-quarter results, with statutory earnings per share significantly beating analyst expectations, although revenues were in line. Analysts have updated their models, but there has been no major change in revenue or earnings per share forecasts for 2026, and the consensus price target remains largely unchanged at US$263. The company is projected to grow faster than the wider industry.

feed.title: Align Technology announces $200M share repurchase
feed.summary: Align Technology (Nasdaq:ALGN) has announced a plan to repurchase $200 million of its common stock through open market transactions. This action falls under its existing $1 billion stock repurchase program approved in April 2025 and reflects the company's confidence in its long-term strategy, strong balance sheet, and ability to generate cash flow. This is part of a series of repurchases made by the dental technology maker in recent years.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks changes its playbook with AI platform acquisition
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks is acquiring AI production firm Portkey to enhance its Prisma AIRS suite, marking a shift from its typical security vendor acquisitions. Portkey specializes in building AI production stacks and control planes, offering an AI gateway to over 3,000 large language models. This acquisition aims to secure AI interactions by inspecting traffic, enforcing governance policies, and centralizing AI model management within enterprise environments, thereby addressing new attack surfaces presented by autonomous agents.

feed.title: Chevron Blows Away Estimates on War-Driven Surge in Oil Prices
feed.summary: Chevron Corp. reported first-quarter profits that exceeded analyst expectations, largely due to increased oil and natural gas prices. The company's acquisition of Hess Corp. also contributed to its strong performance, helping to offset production outages caused by the Iran war and a sequential drop in overall output.

feed.title: Baird downgrades Truist Financial stock rating on valuation
feed.summary: Baird has downgraded Truist Financial (NYSE:TFC) to Neutral from Outperform, setting a price target of $55.00 due to valuation concerns following a significant stock rise since March lows. The firm believes other banks offer better growth potential, citing Truist's weaker net interest income growth position and below-peer loan growth. Despite the downgrade, other analysts like Evercore ISI and RBC Capital have recently raised their price targets for Truist, maintaining Outperform ratings based on improved fee income outlook and strong first-quarter 2026 earnings.

feed.title: Mizuho Adjusts Price Target on McDonald's to $310 From $325, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Mizuho has adjusted its price target for McDonald's (MCD) shares to $310 from $325, while retaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This revision comes as analysts continue to evaluate the fast-food giant's market performance and future outlook. The article also notes recent analyst activities for McDonald's, including other firms adjusting their price targets and ratings.

feed.title: Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. $JKHY Shares Sold by Mitsubishi UFJ Trust & Banking Corp
feed.summary: Mitsubishi UFJ Trust & Banking Corp significantly reduced its stake in Jack Henry & Associates (NASDAQ:JKHY) by 35.4% in the fourth quarter, selling over 65,000 shares. feed.title: Figure Technology (NYSE: FIGR) CEO sells 184,194 shares under plan

The sales occurred at weighted average prices in the low-to-mid $30 range. Concurrently, he exercised stock options for 12,567 shares at an exercise price of $4.82, and following these transactions, he directly holds 3,193,641 Class A shares.

feed.title: Pictet Asset Management Holding SA Has $26.18 Million Stake in Ameriprise Financial, Inc. $AMP

feed.title: Apple’s new CEO said he will continue the company's tradition of secrecy—and Wall Street loved it
feed.summary: Apple's newly appointed CEO, John Ternus, affirmed the company's long-standing tradition of product secrecy during his first earnings call, a move that was seemingly well-received by Wall Street. This continued mystique comes as Apple reported a beat on quarterly revenue and raised future sales guidance. The article also touches on broader market themes including negative corporate spending (capex), the Federal Reserve's hawkish stance, and the geopolitical situation concerning the war in Iran.

feed.title: Mitsubishi UFJ Trust & Banking Corp Sells 24,298 Shares of Verisk Analytics, Inc. $VRSK

feed.title: BTIG lowers Stryker stock price target to $379 on cybersecurity hit
feed.summary: BTIG has lowered its price target for Stryker (NYSE:SYK) to $379 from $397, while maintaining a Buy rating. This adjustment follows Stryker's first-quarter 2026 results, which fell below estimates due to an international cybersecurity incident that impacted procedures and capital order fulfillment. Despite the Q1 shortfall, Stryker has maintained its full-year 2026 guidance, expecting to recover lost sales and showing confidence in its long-term business fundamentals.

feed.title: Executive VP of Technology & Chief Security Officer Of VeriSign Sold 31% Of Their Shares
feed.summary: Danny McPherson, VeriSign's Executive VP of Technology & Chief Security Officer, recently sold US$1.4m worth of stock, reducing his total holding by 31%. This sale contributes to a trend of more insider selling than buying at VeriSign over the last year, although the company maintains high insider ownership. Investors are advised to consider this insider activity along with other risk factors.

feed.title: Genius Sports Announces Close of Acquisition of Legend
feed.summary: Genius Sports has announced the successful completion of its acquisition of Legend, creating a significant digital sports and gaming media powerhouse. This news follows a definitive agreement to acquire Legend that was initially announced on February 5, 2026. The acquisition further solidifies Genius Sports' position in reaching and activating sports audiences.

feed.title: Flutter Cancels New Tranche of Shares Under Ongoing $5 Billion Buyback
feed.summary: Flutter Entertainment has redeemed and cancelled 11,860 U.S.-traded ordinary shares at an average price of $106.4959 per share, reducing its outstanding share count. This move is part of an ongoing $250 million buyback program, which is itself a component of a larger $5 billion share repurchase plan. The action highlights the company's commitment to capital allocation and shareholder returns.

feed.title: Deere taps 20-year veteran Brent Norwood for CFO role
feed.summary: Deere & Company has appointed Brent Norwood, a 20-year company veteran, as its new senior vice president and chief financial officer, effective May 1, 2026. Norwood, 44, previously led finance for Construction and Forestry and John Deere Power Systems and was instrumental in significant acquisitions and the development of Deere's Smart Industrial strategy. His selection follows an extensive internal and external search, highlighting his deep financial expertise and strategic judgment.

feed.title: Valvoline or O’Reilly Automotive: Which Stock Has More Upside?
feed.summary: This article compares Valvoline (VVV) and O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) stocks, concluding that Valvoline offers more upside potential. Valvoline is highlighted for its superior revenue growth, better profitability margins, and relatively lower valuation compared to O'Reilly Automotive. The analysis provides a side-by-side comparison of their financials, historical market performance, and suggests a portfolio approach for investment.

feed.title: Pictet Asset Management Holding SA Boosts Stock Holdings in L3Harris Technologies Inc $LHX
feed.summary: Pictet Asset Management Holding SA increased its stake in L3Harris Technologies Inc. by 5.1% to 76,415 shares, valued at approximately $22.43 million, bringing institutional ownership to 84.76%. L3Harris reported strong Q1 results, beating EPS and revenue expectations, and raised its FY-2026 EPS guidance, although the stock experienced a pullback due to profit-taking and guidance nuances. Analyst sentiment remains "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $349.55, with several firms upgrading ratings or price targets.
